summary: The task is complete in substance. The repository has Prisma/SQLite dependencies, schema, migrations, client setup, deterministic db:prepare, idempotent endpoint seed defaults, generated schema documentation matching the implementation, and repeatability unit coverage. The provided deterministic gate summary shows all required commands passed.
satisfied_exit_criteria: npm run db:prepare creates or updates SQLite runtime state via Prisma migrations, client generation, and seed preparation.
db:prepare repeatability is covered by a unit test using an isolated SQLite database and seed row counts remain singular after two runs.

The Prisma schema represents endpoint names, titles/descriptions, enabled state, immutable IDs, delete codes, default responses, ordered parameters, response cases, timestamps, and basic failure/delay/error config fields.
docs/generated/db-schema.md matches the implemented Endpoint, EndpointParam, and ResponseCase persistence shape and seed assumptions.
Required checks passed: npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify.
